thread.title: Russian President Vladimir Putin has signed a law allowing those who fight in Ukraine to write off debts of up to nearly $100,000 | Northwest & National News | nbcrightnow.com
thread.title_full: Russian President Vladimir Putin has signed a law allowing those who fight in Ukraine to write off debts of up to nearly $100,000 | Northwest & National News | nbcrightnow.com

author: Gavriil GRIGOROV
title: Russian President Vladimir Putin has signed a law allowing those who fight in Ukraine to write off debts of up to nearly $100,000 | Northwest & National News | nbcrightnow.com
text: Russian President Vladimir Putin has signed a law allowing those who fight in Ukraine to write off debts of up to nearly $100,000 - Gavriil GRIGOROV - Updated Tags As featured on Russian President Vladimir Putin on Friday promised more combat test-firing of an experimental hypersonic missile launched at Ukraine, as Volodymyr Zelensky appealed for updated air-defence systems to meet the new threat. Russian President Vladimir Putin on Saturday signed a law that allows those who sign up to fight in Ukraine to write off unpaid debts worth almost $100,000, the government announced.
